Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
